$comment: c43 D-CSUBSET-ADDRESS-CONSTANT-FOLD (Option A): offsetof(T,M) folds as a compile-time integer constant (the address spine (char*)&((T*)0)->M - (char*)0). Value-CORRECT via per-target layout (alignment honored: A.d at 8 not 1). Each case sizes a SOLE-member char array by an offsetof (the sqlite `struct uKey { u8 keyinfoSpace[offsetof(KeyInfo,aColl)]; }` shape, sqlite3.c:24984) and checks sizeof==the true offset. Exit 42 iff all fold correctly. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the const-eval address arms -> the offsetof dim is non-constant -> the sole-member struct is an incomplete-array FAM -> S001C (would not compile). The fold is at semantic (array-dimension) time so the optimized pipelines re-verify the same compile-time sizes; no runtime address arithmetic. All 4 targets.
